creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174559
pecl-ssh2-0.13.patch

- Update to 0.13
- Add LICENSE_FILE
- Take maintainer'ship

Changelog:
- Fixed bug #63660 php_ssh2_fopen_wrapper_parse_path segfaults
- Fixed bug #63855 compilation fails on windows (patch from Erez H)
- Fixed bug #64535 php_ssh2_sftp_dirstream_read segfault on error
  (Matt Pelmear)
- Add reflection API support (Frédéric Hardy)
- Add exit-status support for ssh2 file wrappers (Vladimir Zidar)
- Fixed bug #58893 Unable to request a channel from remote host 
  (Vladimir Zidar)
- Fix segfault when trying to authenticate in servers that do not support 
  authentication (none) (Felipe Weckx)

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: 
	poudriere: i386,  10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  12    (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 12    (OK)
